steps.t: Rékkur has suggested bringing Aighrig with you to the Orc camp. Aighrig stands before the stairs to Annâk-khurfu.
The Orc camp Zarkul-sulûn is located west of Annâk-khurfu. Aighrig believes that Uflúk can be lured out if you find a war horn to use in the camp.
Rékkur awaits your return at Annâk-khurfu, to the east of Zarkul-sulûn. Aighrig has asked you to bring the report to him.
